zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard d'Halluin於1115年出生在法國時，他的父親Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin36歲，母親Gustine d'Avesnes29歲。他和Louise de Haverskerque至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1167年享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard d'Halluin于1115年出生在法国时，他的父亲Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin36岁，母亲Gustine d'Avesnes29岁。他和Louise de Haverskerque至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1167年享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard d'Halluin was born in 1115, in France, his father, Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin, was 36 and his mother, Gustine d'Avesnes, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Louise de Haverskerque. He died in 1167, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard d'Halluin est né en 1115, à France, son père, Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Gustine d'Avesnes, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Louise de Haverskerque. Il est décédé en 1167, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard d'Halluin 1115 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin 36 und seine Mutter Gustine d'Avesnes 29. Er hatte mit Louise de Haverskerque mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1167 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard d'Halluin è nato il nel 1115 nel Francia, il suo padre, Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Gustine d'Avesnes, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Louise de Haverskerque. Morì nel 1167, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard d'Halluinが1115年にフランスで生まれた時，父Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluinは36歳，母Gustine d'Avesnesは29歳であった。彼はLouise de Haverskerqueとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1167年に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard d'Halluin(이)가 1115년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Gustine d'Avesnes(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Louise de Haverskerque(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1167년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard d'Halluin nasceu em 1115, em França, seu pai, Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Gustine d'Avesnes, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Louise de Haverskerque. Ele faleceu em 1167, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard d'Halluin родился в 1115 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Gustine d'Avesnes, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Louise de Haverskerque. Он умер в 1167 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard d'Halluin nació en 1115, en Francia, su papá, Josse Van Halewijn D'Haluin, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Gustine d'Avesnes, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Louise de Haverskerque. Murió en 1167, a la edad de 52 años.
